content.summary: South Korea is a stable, high-income economy with strong legal protection and efficient port infrastructure. IKCEPA provides preferential tariffs for Indonesian exporters.
content.paymentPreference: L/C standard; T/T for trusted partners
bestPractices: IKCEPA (Indonesia-Korea CEPA) provides 0% tariff for many agricultural products
Korea Ministry of Food and Drug Safety (MFDS) approval for food
Korean buyers expect high and consistent quality
